No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to health and well-being targets.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a required university-level calculus course, directly providing quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and foundational skills for various fields (Target 4.4).
evidence: 此課程為大學中眾多科系(如理工類科系、商管類科系等)的基礎課程
墊定高等微積分或其他數學相關科目學習的基礎

Gender Equality.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course cultivates mathematical modeling and scientific computing skills (Core Competencies A, B), foundational for technological upgrading and innovation, supporting economic productivity (Target 8.2).
evidence: 培養建立數學模型，解決問題之能力
培養數理資訊與科學計算之能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly enhances scientific research and technological capabilities (Target 9.5) by training students in mathematical analysis and modeling, essential for innovation in industrial sectors.
evidence: 訓練學生數學分析的能力
培養建立數學模型，解決問題之能力

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to sustainable cities and communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to peace, justice, or strong institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course develops basic data collection and analysis skills (Core Competence C), foundational for statistical capacity-building and developing progress measurements (Targets 17.18, 17.19).
evidence: 資料蒐集與分析數據之基礎能力
